creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
http://lists.gnu.org/archive/html/bug-bash/2009-03/msg00111.html tells
that useing bison instead of yacc can solve this, but I don't know
whether this is harmless...
I can compile libX11 after patched bash.

--- Makefile.orig	2009-03-13 06:19:44.000000000 +0900
+++ Makefile	2009-03-13 17:24:26.000000000 +0900
@@ -31,6 +31,7 @@
 
 IGNOREFILES=		FAQ
 CONFLICTS=		bash-[0-35-9].*
+USE_BISON=		both
 
 .if !defined(WITHOUT_IMPLICITCD)
 EXTRA_PATCHES+=		${PATCHDIR}/xpatch-implicitcd
@@ -92,7 +93,7 @@
 
 CONFIGURE_ENV=		CPPFLAGS="${CPPFLAGS}" \
 			LDFLAGS="${LDFLAGS}" \
-			YACC="${YACC}"
+			YACC="${LOCALBASE}/bin/bison -y"
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
